markdown: Our paper *Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH* was accepted to **ICML-26** as a **Spotlight paper** (top 2.2%)!
Our paper *Incentivizing Truthfulness and Collaborative Fairness in Bayesian Learning* was accepted to **ICML-26** as a **Spotlight paper** (top 2.2%)!
Our paper [*INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy*](../research/inosgd) was accepted to **ICLR-26**.

I was officially conferred the degree of **Bachelor of Science with Honours (Highest Distinction) in Applied Mathematics** and the degree of **Bachelor of Computing (Computer Science) with Honours (Highest Distinction)**.
I was awarded the **A\*STAR Computing and Information Science (ACIS) Scholarship** and the **NUS President's Graduate Fellowship (PGF)**.
I received my Ph.D. offer from NUS School of Computing.
I was awarded the **Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher (OUR) Prize** as the best individual undergraduate researcher in NUS.
Our paper [*Deletion-Anticipative Data Selection with a Limited Budget*](../research/dads) was accepted to **ICML-24**.
I was placed in the **Honour List of Student Tutors** by NUS School of Computing for the academic year 2022 - 2023.
I received the NUS **S**chool of Computing **Take on the World (STOW) award**.
Our paper [*DeRDaVa: Deletion-Robust Data Valuation for Machine Learning*](../research/derdava) was accepted to **AAAI-24**.
I was placed in the **Honour List of Student Tutors** by NUS School of Computing for the academic year 2021 - 2022.
I joined National University of Singapore (NUS).
